elements.description: Circled/hexagon numeral '4' marking a vertical post/member at the eave edge, below the roof slope
'0.30' dimension shown at the top near the ridge/fold, mirrored construction vs. R1

warnings: This detail (R2) is referenced from section รูปตัด 1/2 (หน้า13/14, 'เชิงชาย 2 ดูแบบขยาย R2/A-22') and shows an overhang measured from reference line gridE, matching a 1.50m dimension — the mirror-image counterpart of R1 (which is measured from gridB) on the opposite side of the roof.
This sheet (A-22) contains 2 distinct views: this eave detail (R2, right half) and a first eave detail (R1, left half) — see sibling _หน้า24_eave_r1.json.
Same fascia board spec (8"+8" fiber-cement, 12mm) and FLASHING note as R1, consistent with a single eave design mirrored on both roof slopes.
